# paimonchan.io
> Gateway hub for paimonchan's projects and tools.

paimonchan.io is the landing page directory that links to all of paimonchan's web projects. It serves as the central entry point for discovering available tools and applications.

## Projects

- [Paimon Tools](https://paimonchan.github.io/paimon-tools/): Free, private, in-browser data conversion tools — JSON, CSV, Excel. 100% client-side, no uploads, no sign-up.
- [Paimon Board](https://paimonchan.github.io/paimon-board/): Project board (coming soon).

## About

paimonchan.io is the home page for paimonchan's open-source projects. Each project is its own repository and deploys independently to its own subpath under paimonchan.github.io.

- **Tech stack**: React 19, TypeScript 7, Vite 8, Tailwind CSS v4
- **Design**: Warm ink/honey palette, dark-first with light mode support
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/paimonchan/paimonchan.github.io
